purpose: Provide ethical, operational, and governance frameworks for the responsible use of AI in the financial sector of Qatar.
core_principles: Accountability and transparency in AI-driven systems
Data protection, privacy, and compliance with QCB regulations
Fairness, explainability, and bias mitigation in AI algorithms
Security, robustness, and resilience of AI systems
Human oversight and responsible deployment of AI in banking and finance
implementation_recommendations: Establish AI governance frameworks within financial institutions
Ensure model validation and ongoing monitoring of AI systems
Promote cross-institution collaboration on AI innovation
Develop internal capabilities and training for AI adoption
alignment: Aligned with Qatar National Vision 2030 and QCB’s digital transformation roadmap.
